On basis of above the Company was required to clarify the following:   The response of the Company is enclosed. |SUBJECT: Reply to Clarification- Financial results

DEEP INDUSTRIES LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 28-Jul-2026 to consider and approve the Quarterly Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the period ended June 2026 and ESOP. |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation

N R Agarwal Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that newspaper clipping regarding intimation to concerned shareholders whose shares are liable to be transferred to Demat Account of Investors Education & Protection Fund (IEPF) for their unclaimed dividend for the financial year 2018-19. |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication

Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we have enclosed herewith newspaper clippings regarding notice for transfer of Unclaimed Dividends / Equity Shares to Investor Education and Protection Fund (IEPF) Account in accordance with the provisions of the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (Accounting, Audit, Transfer and Refund) Rules, 2016. Copies of newspaper clippings are attached herewith.This is for your information and record. |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication
